name: nudge
description: Send proactive notifications to the operator via Telegram

tools.name: nudge
tools.description: Surface important information to the operator via Telegram. Used by the observation cycle when it detects something worth notifying about.

thread_id.description: Optional thread ID this nudge relates to

refs.description: Signal reference IDs that triggered this nudge

tools.name: send_document
tools.description: Upload a local file to the operator via Telegram as a document attachment. Use this when the operator asks for results 'as a file', 'as a CSV', 'as a download', or any time text-only delivery would be lossy or truncated. The file must already exist on disk — write it first via the filesystem MCP or another tool, then call send_document with the path.

file_path.description: Absolute path (or ~-expanded path) to the file on the local filesystem

caption.description: Optional caption text shown beneath the document in Telegram (max 1024 chars)

chat_id.description: Optional override for target chat. Defaults to the configured operator chat.
